name: feedbackmonk
renameNote: Working name changed from 'Feedbackr' to 'feedbackmonk' on 2026-05-14 per DEC-FBR-11. ID prefixes DEC-FBR-* / FR-FBR-* are stable and do NOT rename. Code-level rename of feedbackr-* crates / FEEDBACKR_* env vars completed in PF-RENAME-01. Working-dir rename remains tracked in CLAUDE.md Pending Follow-Ups (PF-RENAME-02 is user-action).
description: Standalone open-source SaaS user-feedback platform. Submission widget + status-workflow triage + public roadmap with voting + status emails. Multi-product per tenant. AGPL-3.0-or-later.
